name: @liberia-locker/mtls
description: Phase 0 shared package — mutual TLS between all internal services. Server-side TLS options, an Express middleware enforcing mTLS and extracting caller identity, an outbound client agent, and certificate-rotation hot-reload. Built on infra/scripts/generate-dev-certs.sh (dev CA + per-service leaf certs) for local/CI use.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
